bridle 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Transition

Source: R/decision_graph.R
Transition.Rd

A directed edge between two nodes in the decision graph. Exactly one condition field must be specified: when, always, or otherwise. computable_hint is only valid alongside when.

Transition(
  to = character(0),
  when = character(0),
  computable_hint = character(0),
  always = NA,
  otherwise = NA
)

Arguments

to

Target node ID (character).

when

Natural-language condition text (character). Mutually exclusive with always and otherwise.

computable_hint

R expression hint for when (character). Only valid when when is also specified.

always

If TRUE, transition unconditionally (logical).

otherwise

If TRUE, transition as fallback (logical).

Contents
